scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/schema && npm run build -w packages/client && npm run build -w packages/storage && npm run build -w packages/curation && npm run build -w packages/token-economics && npm run build -w packages/governance && npm run build -w packages/indexer && npm run build -w packages/cli && npm run build -w packages/testing && npm run build -w packages/monitoring && npm run build -w packages/backup
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/client && npm run test -w packages/storage && npm run test -w packages/curation && npm run test -w packages/token-economics && npm run test -w packages/governance && npm run test -w packages/indexer && npm run test -w packages/cli && npm run test -w packages/testing && npm run test -w packages/monitoring && npm run test -w packages/backup
